mapper.sql: id, video_commonts_id AS videoCommontsId, user_id AS userId, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT id id, video_commonts_id videoCommontsId, user_id userId, status status, create_time createTime FROM app_video_commonts_thumbs WHERE video_commonts_id = #{videoCommontsId} and user_id =#{userId}
SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM app_video_commonts_thumbs WHERE video_commonts_id = #{videoCommontsId} and `status` =1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_video_commonts_thumbs WHERE video_commonts_id = #{treeCode} and `status` =1

SELECT id id, video_commonts_id videoCommontsId, user_id userId, status status, create_time createTime FROM app_video_commonts_thumbs WHERE user_id = #{userId} and video_commonts_id = #{treeCode} and status = 1
